# Jireh Studio - Full Site Copy

Jireh Studio is a digital design and engineering agency crafting premium brand websites, high-conversion storefronts, and custom software. We blend world-class UI/UX, robust development, revenue marketing, and custom workflow AI to scale your business.

## Core Value Proposition
- **High-Performance Online Systems**: We design, build, and optimize digital solutions.
- **Three Pillars, One Delivery Engine**: Web development, marketing, and AI & automation, all under one roof.
- **No Retainer Lock-in**: We deliver your system and hand you the keys, with no long-term monthly retainers.
- **Speed to Value**: First major milestone shipped in 4 to 6 weeks.

---

## Services & Pillars of Expertise

### 1. Web Development & UI/UX
Custom-designed websites, storefronts, and web applications engineered for low Largest Contentful Paint (LCP < 1s), fast load times, and conversion-rate optimization that reduces bounce.
- **Capabilities**:
  - Custom design systems
  - Core Web Vitals tuning
  - CRO & A/B testing

### 2. Marketing & Branding
Brand rebuilds, identity systems, SEO infrastructure, content engines, and performance ad campaigns engineered to grow online revenue, not just traffic.
- **Capabilities**:
  - Brand identity rebuilds
  - SEO systems & content engines
  - Paid acquisition & marketing

### 3. AI and Automation Services
Workflow design, notification systems, and pipeline rules that remove manual work. Custom dashboards and monitoring nodes that reduce operational errors.
- **Capabilities**:
  - Workflow AI and automation
  - Monitoring dashboards & alerting
  - Pipeline rules & automation integrations

---

## Selected Work

### Matti Sirvio Art Galleria (International Art Gallery)
- **Tag**: International Art Gallery
- **Website**: https://mattisirvioartgalleria.com
- **Metric**: Global audience reach
- **Description**: A scalable monorepo architecture featuring an Astro frontend, React admin panel, and Cloudflare workers. Engineered with rigorous SEO, accessibility, and Core Web Vitals optimization.

### Sunzee Travel (Destination Agency)
- **Tag**: Destination Agency
- **Website**: https://sunzeeholidays.com
- **Metric**: Bespoke travel journeys
- **Description**: A bespoke travel platform showcasing signature destinations across East Africa and the Indian Ocean. Designed to seamlessly convert wanderlust into direct booking inquiries.

---

## The Jireh Difference

We hand over the keys. Most agencies sell you a single campaign or website, then lock you into perpetual retainers. Jireh Studio delivers a complete, integrated system and trains your team to run it.

| Capability / Offering | Jireh Studio (Full System) | Typical Agency (A La Carte) |
| :--- | :---: | :---: |
| Custom-designed website or storefront | Yes | Partial / Template |
| Core Web Vitals tuning (LCP < 1s target) | Yes | No |
| Conversion-rate optimization & A/B framework | Yes | No |
| Brand identity & design system rebuild | Yes | Partial |
| SEO infrastructure + content engine | Yes | No |
| Workflow AI and automation & pipeline rules | Yes | No |
| Monitoring dashboards & alerting | Yes | Partial |
| Fixed-scope kickoff, weekly demos | Yes | No |
| First milestone in 4–6 weeks | Yes | No |
| Long-term retainer lock-in | No | Yes |

---

## Our Four-Stage Delivery Process

We typically ship our first major milestone in 4 to 6 weeks. Each stage produces a concrete, reviewable artifact.

### Stage 1: Discovery (Week 1)
We map the core problem, audit existing systems, and align on target milestones. No assumptions ship without evidence.

### Stage 2: Strategy (Week 1–2)
We design the user experience, architecture, and deployment plan. Every decision is documented and reviewable.

### Stage 3: Build (Week 2–5)
We develop, integrate systems, and prepare content. Modular delivery means you see working software early and often.

### Stage 4: Launch (Week 4–6)
We deploy, monitor, and execute the first optimization cycle. Then we hand over the keys and stay on call.

---

## Client Outcomes & Testimonials

### Rebuilt storefront from the ground up
- **Client**: Sarah Chen, CEO, Northwind FinTech
- **Outcome**: LCP dropped to under a second, conversions jumped 38% in the first month.
- **Metric**: 150+ Projects launched

### Marketing infrastructure instead of simple campaigns
- **Client**: Brian Zakin, CTO, Solstice Commerce
- **Outcome**: Steady 3x lift in qualified leads across every market.
- **Metric**: 300% Average ROI

### AI & automation removing manual coordination
- **Client**: Nareh Hovsepian, COO, Orbital Logistics
- **Outcome**: Removed two full-time roles of manual coordination from the logistics stack.
- **Metric**: 50m+ Data points processed
